mapper.sql: select id, division_code, division_name, parent_code, division_level, full_code, full_name, contact_person, contact_phone, address, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from shebao_administrative_division
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0' and status = '0'
AND parent_code = #{parentCode}
AND parent_code IS NULL
order by sort_order asc, division_code asc

WITH RECURSIVE division_tree AS ( -- 起始节点 SELECT division_code, division_name, parent_code, division_level, division_code as full_code, division_name as full_name FROM shebao_administrative_division WHERE division_code = #{divisionCode} AND del_flag = '0'
UNION ALL
-- 递归查找父级 SELECT p.division_code, p.division_name, p.parent_code, p.division_level, CONCAT(p.division_code, '/', dt.full_code) as full_code, CONCAT(p.division_name, '/', dt.full_name) as full_name FROM shebao_administrative_division p INNER JOIN division_tree dt ON p.division_code = dt.parent_code WHERE p.del_flag = '0' ) SELECT division_code, division_name, parent_code, division_level, full_code, full_name FROM division_tree WHERE parent_code IS NULL ORDER BY division_level DESC LIMIT 1
select count(1) from shebao_administrative_division where parent_code = #{divisionCode} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from shebao_village where parent_code = #{divisionCode} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert:
insert into shebao_administrative_division (division_code, division_name, parent_code, division_level, full_code, full_name, contact_person, contact_phone, address, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values
(#{item.divisionCode}, #{item.divisionName}, #{item.parentCode}, #{item.divisionLevel}, #{item.fullCode}, #{item.fullName}, #{item.contactPerson}, #{item.contactPhone}, #{item.address}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.status}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.remark})
mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE children_tree AS ( -- 直接子级 SELECT id, division_code, division_name, parent_code, division_level, full_code, full_name, contact_person, contact_phone, address, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM shebao_administrative_division WHERE parent_code = #{divisionCode} AND del_flag = '0'
UNION ALL
-- 递归查找所有子级 SELECT c.id, c.division_code, c.division_name, c.parent_code, c.division_level, c.full_code, c.full_name, c.contact_person, c.contact_phone, c.address, c.sort_order, c.status, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark FROM shebao_administrative_division c INNER JOIN children_tree ct ON c.parent_code = ct.division_code WHERE c.del_flag = '0' ) SELECT * FROM children_tree ORDER BY division_level ASC, sort_order ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE shebao_administrative_division SET full_code = REPLACE(full_code, #{oldFullCode}, #{newFullCode}), full_name = REPLACE(full_name, #{oldFullName}, #{newFullName}), update_time = #{updateTime}, update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE del_flag = '0' AND (full_code LIKE CONCAT(#{oldFullCode}, '/%') OR full_name LIKE CONCAT(#{oldFullName}, '/%'))
